description_long: This is a sleek, rectangular black induction cooker with five distinct burners arranged symmetrically on its flat surface. The cooktop features a central burner, flanked by two burners on each side, all encased in square metallic frames with circular grates. Along the front edge, there are five metallic control knobs, evenly spaced and slightly raised, providing tactile feedback for adjusting heat levels. The surface appears to be made of tempered glass or ceramic, giving it a glossy, reflective finish, while the burners and knobs are likely constructed from metal. No digital display, brand logo, or power cord is visible on the exterior. The overall design is minimalist and modern, suitable for contemporary urban kitchens or outdoor cooking setups.
description: A modern black induction cooker with five burners, metallic control knobs, and a glossy, flat surface. The design is minimalist and functional, with no visible digital display or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five burners and the row of five metallic control knobs centered along the front edge.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the left side of the cooktop and the alignment of the control knobs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the five burners without any visible controls or additional features.
description_view_3: Side-angled view from the right, showing the rightmost burners and the row of control knobs.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Five metallic rotary knobs are evenly spaced in a single row along the front edge of the cooktop, with no visible labels, icons, or indicator lights.
